english_text: I will find you no matter what
Do you know how long I've waited?
Forget me if it hurts too much
I want to turn back time
It hurts so much I could die
My heart won't listen to me
korean_text: 내 마음이 내 맘대로 안 돼
romanization: nae maeumi nae mamdaero an dwae

english_text: From the beginning it was always you
If you cry I cry too
I'll erase myself from your memory
Even if the world turns against me
I was never good enough for you
I did it all for you
The end is just a new beginning
I'll protect my family at all costs
Life doesn't always go as planned
The night is always darkest before dawn
I'll show you what I'm made of
I knew this day would come
If it's meant to be it will be
Behind every smile is a story
I won't let you suffer alone
I'm doing this for all of us
